completed_tasks.name: Thread/persistence foundation and Wave 0 test scaffolds
Durable thread schema and thread-aware contracts/endpoints
Explicit fact memory and clarification policy
Grounded final scenario composition and serialization lock
UTF-8 thread request fix
completed_tasks.progress: Added servlet UTF-8 encoding config in application.yaml, added Vietnamese JSON controller regressions in ChatThreadControllerTest, and verified Vietnamese create/post thread requests work live on port 18090 without UTF-8 parse errors.

completed_tasks.name: Clarification-to-final-analysis mapper fix
completed_tasks.progress: Updated ChatThreadMapper to preserve structured scenario fields and effective sources during thread remapping, and tightened ChatScenarioAnalysisIntegrationTest and ChatThreadFlowIntegrationTest fixtures so focused clarification-flow tests now pass.

remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose live post-clarification fallback in ChatService/model-output path
Re-run live Phase 3 API verification and update planning/state artifacts

blockers.description: Live post-clarification responses still fall back to SCENARIO_ANALYSIS with scenarioAnalysis=null instead of FINAL_ANALYSIS.
blockers.workaround: None yet. Mapper preservation bug is fixed; next investigation must focus on ChatService/model output and fallback drafting after clarification.

blockers.description: .env contains an extra invalid trailing line ('to'), which breaks plain shell sourcing.
blockers.workaround: Parse only valid KEY=value lines or avoid sourcing .env directly.

decisions.decision: Use Windows gradlew.bat with JAVA_HOME=C:/Users/admin/.jdks/temurin-25.0.2 for all live verification.
decisions.rationale: WSL/bash launch paths previously broke Java 25 toolchain detection and wrapper behavior.

decisions.decision: Add explicit servlet UTF-8 encoding in application.yaml before touching broader request logic.
decisions.rationale: Live Vietnamese JSON thread requests were failing with Jackson UTF-8 parse errors while ASCII succeeded.

decisions.decision: Fix ChatThreadMapper before broader scenario-flow changes.
decisions.rationale: The mapper was dropping scenarioFacts/scenarioRule/scenarioOutcome/scenarioActions during thread remapping, which was a real code bug even though it did not fully resolve the live acceptance failure.

next_action: Start from the already-running local verification setup, reproduce the clarified thread case on port 18090, and inspect ChatService/fallback drafting to determine why post-clarification live responses still come back as LIMITED_GROUNDING + SCENARIO_ANALYSIS with scenarioAnalysis=null.
context_notes: The UTF-8 transport bug is resolved and the mapper bug is resolved. Focus next on why the live path still emits fallback-style answers after clarification even though focused tests are green. The likely gap is between real model output / parseDraft fallback behavior and the structured scenario composition expectations. Also note there is an unexpected unrelated modification in src/main/java/com/vn/traffic/chatbot/common/config/AsyncConfig.java that was not part of this work and should be reviewed before any commit beyond handoff files.
